title: Surgeon Vacancy at GE Healthcare India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at GE Healthcare India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!
